head: Data Engineer – QuantumBlack, AI by McKinsey
info: 中国 香港特别行政区 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 90 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Who You'll Work With

Driving lasting impact and building long-term capabilities with our clients is not easy work. You are the kind of person who thrives in a high performance/high reward culture - doing hard things, picking yourself up when you stumble, and having the resilience to try another way forward.

In return for your drive, determination, and curiosity, we'll provide the resources, mentorship, and opportunities you need to become a stronger leader faster than you ever thought possible. Your colleagues—at all levels—will invest deeply in your development, just as much as they invest in delivering exceptional results for clients. Every day, you'll receive apprenticeship, coaching, and exposure that will accelerate your growth in ways you won’t find anywhere else.
When you join us, you will have:

Continuous learning: Our learning and apprenticeship culture, backed by structured programs, is all about helping you grow while creating an environment where feedback is clear, actionable, and focused on your development. The real magic happens when you take the input from others to heart and embrace the fast-paced learning experience, owning your journey.

A voice that matters: From day one, we value your ideas and contributions. You’ll make a tangible impact by offering innovative ideas and practical solutions, all while upholding our unwavering commitment to ethics and integrity. We not only encourage diverse perspectives, but they are critical in driving us toward the best possible outcomes.

Global community: With colleagues across 65+ countries and over 100 different nationalities, our firm’s diversity fuels creativity and helps us come up with the best solutions for our clients. Plus, you’ll have the opportunity to learn from exceptional colleagues with diverse backgrounds and experiences.

World-class benefits: On top of a competitive salary (based on your location, experience, and skills), we provide a comprehensive benefits package to enable holistic well-being for you and your family.
Your Impact

You will be based at one of our Greater China offices and be part of our global Data Engineering community, working on cross-functional Agile project teams alongside Data Scientists, Machine Learning Engineers, other Data Engineers, Project Managers, and industry experts.
As a Data Engineer, you’ll help to build and maintain the technical platform for advanced analytics engagements, spanning data science and data engineering work
design and build data pipelines for machine learning that are robust, modular, scalable, deployable, reproducible, and versioned
create and manage data environments and ensure information security standards are maintained at all times
understand clients data landscape and assess data quality
map data fields to hypotheses and curate, wrangle, and prepare data for use in advanced analytics models. You will have the opportunity to contribute to R&D projects and internal asset development

and contribute to cross-functional problem-solving sessions with your team and our clients, from data owners and users to C-level executives, to address their needs and build impactful analytics solutions.

You will work hand-in-hand with our clients, from data owners, users, and fellow engineers to C-level executives. You will be a highly-collaborative individual who wants to solve problems that drive business value. You have a strong sense of ownership and enjoy hands-on technical work. Our values resonate with yours.
Only at McKinsey
Work on real-world, high-impact projects across a variety of industries
– Have the opportunity to collaborate with QB/Labs teams and build complex and innovative ML systems to accelerate our work in AI – and help solve business problems at speed and scale.
Experience the best environment to grow as a technologist and a leader

– Develop a sought-after perspective connecting technology and business value by working on real-life problems across a variety of industries and technical challenges to serve our clients on their changing needs.
Be surrounded by inspiring individuals as part of diverse multidisciplinary teams
- Develop a holistic perspective of AI by partnering with the best design, technical, and business talent in the world as your team members.
Our Tech Stack

While we advocate for using the right tech for the right task, we often leverage the following technologies: Python, PySpark, the PyData stack, SQL, Airflow, Databricks, our own open-source data pipelining framework called Kedro, Dask/RAPIDS, container technologies such as Docker and Kubernetes, cloud solutions such as AWS, GCP, and Azure, and more.
Your Qualifications and Skills
Degree in computer science, engineering, mathematics, or equivalent experience
Ability to write clean, maintainable, scalable and robust code in an object-oriented language, e.g., Python, Scala, Java, in a professional setting
1+ years’ experience building data pipelines in a professional setting would be considered a plus
Proven experience building data pipelines in production for advanced analytics use cases
Experience working across structured, semi-structured and unstructured data

Familiarity with analytics libraries (e.g. pandas, numpy, matplotlib), data pipeline framework (e.g Airflow, Kedro, AzureML), one of distributed computing frameworks (e.g. Spark, Dask), experience with cloud platforms (e.g. AWS, Azure, GCP) is a plus
Exposure to software engineering concepts and best practices, inc. DevOps, DataOps and MLOps would be considered a plus
Experience deploying containerized application to Kubernetes is a plus
Good presentation and communication skills, with the ability to communicate complex ideas effectively - both verbally and in writing - in English and Chinese
Willingness to travel

1. Continuous learning: Our learning and apprenticeship culture, backed by structured programs, is all about helping you grow while creating an environment where feedback is clear, actionable, and focused on your development. The real magic happens when you take the input from others to heart and embrace the fast-paced learning experience, owning your journey.

2. A voice that matters: From day one, we value your ideas and contributions. You’ll make a tangible impact by offering innovative ideas and practical solutions, all while upholding our unwavering commitment to ethics and integrity. We not only encourage diverse perspectives, but they are critical in driving us toward the best possible outcomes.

3. Global community: With colleagues across 65+ countries and over 100 different nationalities, our firm’s diversity fuels creativity and helps us come up with the best solutions for our clients. Plus, you’ll have the opportunity to learn from exceptional colleagues with diverse backgrounds and experiences.

4. World-class benefits: On top of a competitive salary (based on your location, experience, and skills), we provide a comprehensive benefits package to enable holistic well-being for you and your family.
1. Degree in computer science, engineering, mathematics, or equivalent experience
2. Ability to write clean, maintainable, scalable and robust code in an object-oriented language, e.g., Python, Scala, Java, in a professional setting
3. 1+ years’ experience building data pipelines in a professional setting would be considered a plus
4. Proven experience building data pipelines in production for advanced analytics use cases
5. Experience working across structured, semi-structured and unstructured data

6. Familiarity with analytics libraries (e.g. pandas, numpy, matplotlib), data pipeline framework (e.g Airflow, Kedro, AzureML), one of distributed computing frameworks (e.g. Spark, Dask), experience with cloud platforms (e.g. AWS, Azure, GCP) is a plus
7. Exposure to software engineering concepts and best practices, inc. DevOps, DataOps and MLOps would be considered a plus
8. Experience deploying containerized application to Kubernetes is a plus
9. Good presentation and communication skills, with the ability to communicate complex ideas effectively - both verbally and in writing - in English and Chinese
10. Willingness to travel
company_box_content: We are QuantumBlack, AI by McKinsey.
We bring the power of Artificial Intelligence combined with the unique strengths of people, to create a new source of dynamic, competitive advantage we call hybrid intelligence.
QuantumBlack was born and proven in Formula 1, where teams live and breathe data. Today, we are the Artificial Intelligence (AI) arm of McKinsey & Company.
At QuantumBlack, you’ll tackle critical problems faced by the world’s leading organizations—and society—while collaborating with the brightest strategic, data science and engineering minds.
We put the health and safety of our people - candidates, clients, communities - first.
We provide flexibility for our people to shape their working models.
In today’s competitive environment, organisations that respond faster to change, with better insight and greater precision, hold a sustainable advantage.
At the same time, information has gone from scarce to superabundant, affording an unprecedented opportunity for them to do so.
Effective decision-making is therefore increasingly underpinned by data processing and technology capabilities.
Follow and like posts that use the following hashtags, most relevant to you, to see more from our community:
This is our general tag where you can discover all things QuantumBlack
This is where you can learn all about our insights, AI experimentation, and key tips that could help as you explore what AI can do for your business
Explore what this term means, and why it’s been integral to the evolution of technology and human achievement.
Our colleagues use this tag for events, training, socials, and offers a glimpse inside our culture
If you’re interested in joining QuantumBlack, be sure to keep an eye on this one. Our team will use it to let you know about upcoming events and new roles.
company_description: The AI arm of McKinsey & Company, specializing in hybrid intelligence and data engineering with a global team. It focuses on building data pipelines, cloud solutions, and advanced analytics for client projects.

head: Manager / Assistant Manager - CRM (Campaign Automation and Development)
info: 中国 澳门特别行政区 · 5 个月前 · 42 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Job Description:

We are seeking a technically adept and marketing minded Manager (Campaign Automation and Development) to join our CRM team. This role is ideal for a candidate with a strong foundation in software architecture, API development, and data engineering, who can translate business needs into scalable, maintainable, and efficient technical solutions.

The successful candidate will lead the design and implementation of campaign automation systems, integrating APIs for content management and marketing channels, orchestrating workflows, and optimizing data pipelines. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to ensure that technical solutions align with business objectives and deliver measurable impact.
Key Responsibilities
1. Architect and implement scalable software solutions for campaign automation, with a focus on modularity, maintainability, and performance
2. Design and develop data services to support campaign workflows and integrate with internal and external systems
3. Analyze business requirements and translate them into robust technical designs and workflow logic
4. Develop, test, and deploy reusable components using Python and SQL, ensuring high reliability and performance
5. Configure and manage Airflow environments for orchestrating ETL processes and campaign logic
6. Build and maintain data pipelines that support real-time and batch processing for CRM campaigns
7. Collaborate with business stakeholders to align technical solutions with strategic goals
8. Monitor system performance and proactively optimize workflows and APIs for scalability and efficiency
9. Troubleshoot complex issues across the software stack and provide expert-level support
10. Maintain comprehensive documentation of architecture, APIs, and workflow processes
Required Skills and Experience:
1. Proven experience in software architecture and API development, especially in Python-based environments
2. Strong proficiency in Python, SQL, and workflow orchestration tools like Airflow
3. Experience designing and deploying RESTful APIs and integrating with third-party services
4. Familiarity with Linux environments, DevOps practices, and development tools such as VSCode
5. Solid understanding of ETL processes, data modeling, and pipeline optimization
6. Strong business acumen with the ability to align technical solutions with organizational goals
7. Flexibility and adaptability to handle changing priorities and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment
8. Excellent problem-solving skills and a proactive mindset for continuous improvement
9. Effective communication and collaboration skills across technical and non-technical teams
10. Proficiency in English and Cantonese/ Mandarin
Preferred Qualifications:
1. Bachelor’s degree in computer science, software engineering, or a related field
2. Minimum 5 years of experience in software development, data engineering and data services, with a focus on business process optimization
3. Experience with marketing automation platforms, data visualization tools, and agile methodologies
4. Demonstrated success in driving process improvements and delivering business value through technology
5. Experience in the integrated resort or hospitality industry is a plus
***Less experienced will be considered as Assistant Manager
company_description: Company information not provided in the posting. The role involves software architecture, API development, and data pipeline engineering for campaign automation in a marketing context.

head: Analytics Engineer- Data Operations & Governance
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 30 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

1. Data Operations & Governance: Own the accuracy, reliability, and structure of product and user-event data through robust governance practices; Define and enforce standards for event tracking, data schemas, and documentation across teams; Conduct regular audits, validation checks, and coordinate instrumentation changes with engineering and product teams

2. Data Pipeline Development & Maintenance: Build and maintain scalable, observable data pipelines using tools like dbt, Airflow, or similar frameworks; Monitor pipeline health, implement alerting systems, and resolve data issues with root cause analysis; Optimize pipeline performance and ensure high availability of core datasets for analytics and reporting

3. Internal Tooling & Automation: Develop and maintain internal data tools, utilities, and dashboards using SQL, Python, and lightweight web technologies; Automate workflows to reduce manual reporting and improve operational efficiency for data stakeholders; Create reusable data models that support fast iteration and confident self-service analysis

4. Competitive Intelligence & Data Collection: Operate and enhance data scraping workflows to collect structured information on competitors, pricing, and market trends; Ensure scraping systems are stable, maintainable, and compliant with data privacy and ethical standards

1. Engineering Foundation: Strong SQL and working proficiency in Python or JavaScript for building and maintaining data infrastructure; Experience with modern data engineering tools (e.g., dbt, Airflow, Fivetran, Dagster); Familiarity with version control (Git), code modularization, and documentation practices

2. Data Quality & Governance Experience: Track record designing or maintaining data governance practices in product analytics environments (e.g., Segment, GA4, Mixpanel); Comfortable building QA checks, anomaly detection, and data validation processes; Familiarity with data governance education and data governance related stakeholder management

3. Operational Mindset: Comfortable being on point for data issues, debugging pipeline failures, and ensuring continuity in reporting and dashboards; Ability to set up alerting/logging mechanisms to proactively detect and respond to data problems

4. Collaboration & Communication: Strong written and verbal communication skills to align with product, engineering, and business teams; Able to translate business questions into engineering requirements and technical work into stakeholder-friendly language

5. Preferred Qualifications: Prior experience / knowledge on data science / machine learning; Prior experience on hands-on data engineering; Understanding of data operation & governance in analytics workflows; Experience supporting data for experimentation or A/B testing pipelines

We may use artificial intelligence tools to analyze the content of your Resume/CV against the specific requirements for the position. The purpose is to support our recruitment team in reviewing applications more effectively. These tools assist our recruitment team in their evaluation of your application by providing recommendations, but they do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans who consider the insights generated by the tools along with other relevant information. If you would like more details about how your personal information is processed, please contact us.
company_box_content: Crypto.com was founded in 2016 and is the preferred crypto trading platform for over 100 million users worldwide, as well as the trusted industry leader in regulatory compliance, security, and privacy. We’re committed to accelerating the adoption of cryptocurrency through our vision: Cryptocurrency in Every Wallet™
company_description: A leading crypto trading platform with over 100 million users worldwide, focusing on regulatory compliance and security. The role involves data operations, governance, and pipeline development using tools like dbt and Airflow.

head: Data Software Engineer - Data Scientist
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

Jump Trading Group is committed to world class research. We empower exceptional talents in Mathematics, Physics, and Computer Science to seek scientific boundaries, push through them, and apply cutting edge research to global financial markets. Our culture is unique. Constant innovation requires fearlessness, creativity, intellectual honesty, and a relentless competitive streak. We believe in winning together and unlocking unique individual talent by incenting collaboration and mutual respect. At Jump, research outcomes drive more than superior risk adjusted returns. We design, develop, and deploy technologies that change our world, fund start-ups across industries, and partner with leading global research organizations and universities to solve problems.

Core Development is a global team of technologists who architect, build and maintain our world-class trading platform. From optimizing our core trading engine to building custom hardware, we leverage software & hardware engineering, data science and research, to deliver the infrastructure and tools that drive our trading and business needs.

Jump Trading established its dedication to the China market with the launch of our Shanghai office in late 2017 with the ambition of building an independently operational office. Due to this ambition, we are growing our competencies in Trading, Technology and Operations. We bring together the best of two worlds
A start-up environment powered by Global Jump Trading dedication and resources.
What You'll Do:
Ingest, process, and normalize large volumes of structured and unstructured financial data from a variety of sources to support trading and researching
Collaborate closely with data scientists, quant traders, and portfolio managers to understand data needs, design and deliver scalable data infrastructure
Continuously evaluate and implement new tools and technologies to improve data engineering capabilities
Skills You’ll Need:
3+ years of experience in data engineering
Strong Python programming skills
Solid understanding of data architecture principles, data modeling, and data warehousing
Insights into commonly used quant data and experience with alternative data
Experience with LLM is a bonus
1. Ingest, process, and normalize large volumes of structured and unstructured financial data from a variety of sources to support trading and researching
2. Collaborate closely with data scientists, quant traders, and portfolio managers to understand data needs, design and deliver scalable data infrastructure
3. Continuously evaluate and implement new tools and technologies to improve data engineering capabilities
1. 3+ years of experience in data engineering
2. Strong Python programming skills
3. Solid understanding of data architecture principles, data modeling, and data warehousing
4. Insights into commonly used quant data and experience with alternative data
5. Experience with LLM is a bonus
company_box_content: For more than 25 years, Jump Trading has been home to people who see trading as the most fascinating problem in the world and want to solve it from every angle.
Headquartered in Chicago with 13 offices across 8 countries, we operate across asset classes, time zones, and horizons. If it trades, we want to trade it.

We are traders, engineers, and researchers working side by side to build the systems that move global markets. Our culture is built on curiosity, precision, and relentless iteration. We care deeply about impact, collaboration, and solving problems few ever get to see.

At Jump Trading, AI and machine learning are central to how we trade and build. We design and deploy advanced models, infrastructure, and tools to operate at scale in high-stakes, adversarial environments. From low-latency systems to cutting-edge research, we push the boundaries of what is possible.

We are also committed to the next generation of talent. Our student programs, from internships to our fully funded PhD Fellowships, provide hands-on experience, mentorship, and opportunities to do meaningful work. We support students at leading conferences worldwide and invite them to work with our teams on real-world challenges.
company_description: Jump Trading is a global trading firm with 13 offices across 8 countries, specializing in asset trading using AI, machine learning, and advanced technology. It focuses on research, engineering, and low-latency systems to operate in high-stakes financial markets.

head: Senior Python Data Engineer (Finance Technology)
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 重新发布时间: 2 周前 · 14 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

We are a team to design, develop, maintain, and improve software for various ventures projects, i.e., projects that are adjacent to our core businesses and are bootstrapped fast with a lean team. You will be actively involved in the design of various components behind scalable applications, from frontend UI to backend infrastructure.
We build and maintain a data transformation pipeline for Finance teams at
Crypto.com

. Design and implement robust data pipelines, guaranteeing data quality, data delivery, and timely financial reporting for Finance teams. Deliver tailored data products, designed to empower users with self-serve capabilities and ensure accurate answers to their data queries.
1. Python - Must be adept at scripting in Python
2. SQL - Techniques for querying, transformation, and performance optimisation
3. Apache Airflow - Experience working with DAGs in Airflow or a similar tool
4. GitHub - Experience with version control, branching, and collaboration on GitHub
5. Collaboration - Ability to work with stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical solutions
6. Communication - Spoken english
7. Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, AWS/cloud platforms, and unit testing
8. Bonus Experience: Elixir, Cloudera Data Warehouse, AWS Athena/Tableau
1. Design and refactor Directed Acyclic Graphs (DAGs) with Python and Apache Airflow to enhance data for financial reporting requirements
2. Maintain internal tooling used for managing sensitive company data.
3. Work closely with Data Science, Data Warehouse, Exchange, Backend, and Finance teams to align on data requirements and deliverables
4. Maintain clear and comprehensive documentation of processes to facilitate smooth team collaboration and hand-offs
Life @ Crypto.com
Empowered to think big. Try new opportunities while working with a talented, ambitious and supportive team.
Transformational and proactive working environment. Empower employees to find thoughtful and innovative solutions.
Growth from within. We help to develop new skill-sets that would impact the shaping of your personal and professional growth.
Work Culture. Our colleagues are some of the best in the industry
we are all here to help and support one another.
One cohesive team. Engage stakeholders to achieve our ultimate goal - Cryptocurrency in every wallet.
Work Flexibility Adoption. Flexi-work hour and hybrid or remote set-up
Aspire career alternatives through us - our internal mobility program offers employees a new scope.
Work Perks: crypto.com visa card provided upon joining
Are you ready to kickstart your future with us?
Benefits
Competitive salary
Attractive annual leave entitlement including: birthday, work anniversary
Work Flexibility Adoption. Flexi-work hour and hybrid or remote set-up
Aspire career alternatives through us. Our internal mobility program can offer employees a diverse scope.
Work Perks: crypto.com visa card provided upon joining
Our Crypto.com benefits packages vary depending on region requirements, you can learn more from our talent acquisition team.
About Crypto.com:

Founded in 2016, Crypto.com serves more than 150 million customers and is the world's fastest growing global cryptocurrency platform. Our vision is simple: Cryptocurrency in Every Wallet™. Built on a foundation of security, privacy, and compliance, Crypto.com is committed to accelerating the adoption of cryptocurrency through innovation and empowering the next generation of builders, creators, and entrepreneurs to develop a fairer and more equitable digital ecosystem.
Learn more at https://crypto.com.

Crypto.com is an equal opportunities employer and we are committed to creating an environment where opportunities are presented to everyone in a fair and transparent way. Crypto.com values diversity and inclusion, seeking candidates with a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and skills that complement and strengthen our team.
Personal data provided by applicants will be used for recruitment purposes only.
Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

We may use artificial intelligence tools to analyze the content of your Resume/CV against the specific requirements for the position. The purpose is to support our recruitment team in reviewing applications more effectively. These tools assist our recruitment team in their evaluation of your application by providing recommendations, but they do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans who consider the insights generated by the tools along with other relevant information. If you would like more details about how your personal information is processed, please contact us.
company_box_content: Crypto.com was founded in 2016 and is the preferred crypto trading platform for over 100 million users worldwide, as well as the trusted industry leader in regulatory compliance, security, and privacy. We’re committed to accelerating the adoption of cryptocurrency through our vision: Cryptocurrency in Every Wallet™
company_description: Crypto.com is a global cryptocurrency platform with over 100 million users, focusing on secure and compliant crypto trading and services. The company is a fast-growing platform with a vision for cryptocurrency adoption, indicating a large fintech company.

head: Senior Data Engineer
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 2 周前 · 29 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

Optiver is a leading global market maker powered by technology, rigorous research, and deep collaboration. As we become increasingly data-driven, our ability to capture, model, and deliver high-quality data at scale is fundamental to maintaining our trading edge. We are seeking a Data Engineer to join our Data Engineering team. In this role, you will own the end-to-end data lifecycle—from raw market data capture through to normalized datasets used by both trading and research.
WHAT YOU’LL WORK ON:
Build and maintain robust data pipelines for capturing and processing raw data.
Ingest, catalog, and manage a variety of data sources, including market data, execution data, reference data, and more.
Model and normalize complex financial datasets to ensure they are clean, consistent, and easily accessible for research and production.
Ensure all datasets are well managed and governed within our global data lake.
Collaborate closely with traders, researchers, and engineers across multiple global offices to understand evolving data requirements and deliver scalable solutions.
Implement rigorous data-quality checks, monitoring, and alerting to guarantee reliability and consistency.
Contribute to the architecture and scaling of our global data platform to support ever-growing data-intensive strategies.
WHAT YOU WILL NEED:
5+ years of experience as a Data Engineer or in a similar role in a high-performance environment, preferably within financial services.
Proficiency with Python, C++ is a big plus
Experience with market data & exchange protocol is highly desirable
Solid understanding of data capturing, data modeling, and normalization.
Proficiency in designing and implementing distributed data pipelines.
Experience with lakehouse architectures (e.g., Delta Lake, Databricks) is preferred.
Strong software engineering fundamentals, especially around performance, reliability, and scalability in distributed systems.
Excellent communication skills and the ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
Diversity statement
Optiver is committed to
diversity and inclusion
. We encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds, and welcome requests for reasonable adjustments during the process.
Questions?
Get in touch with the recruitment team at careers@optiver.com.au.
Privacy disclaimer
Optiver 重视个人信息的保护。请您在提供个人信息给我们之前，认真阅读Optiver China Privacy Notice, 了解我们如何收集及处理您的个人信息。
Personal information protection is of utmost importance to Optiver. Before you provide any personal information to us, we strongly urge you to read our
Privacy Policy
to acknowledge how we collect and process your personal information.
1. Build and maintain robust data pipelines for capturing and processing raw data.
2. Ingest, catalog, and manage a variety of data sources, including market data, execution data, reference data, and more.
3. Model and normalize complex financial datasets to ensure they are clean, consistent, and easily accessible for research and production.
4. Ensure all datasets are well managed and governed within our global data lake.
5. Collaborate closely with traders, researchers, and engineers across multiple global offices to understand evolving data requirements and deliver scalable solutions.
6. Implement rigorous data-quality checks, monitoring, and alerting to guarantee reliability and consistency.
7. Contribute to the architecture and scaling of our global data platform to support ever-growing data-intensive strategies.
1. 5+ years of experience as a Data Engineer or in a similar role in a high-performance environment, preferably within financial services.
2. Proficiency with Python, C++ is a big plus
3. Experience with market data & exchange protocol is highly desirable
4. Solid understanding of data capturing, data modeling, and normalization.
5. Proficiency in designing and implementing distributed data pipelines.
6. Experience with lakehouse architectures (e.g., Delta Lake, Databricks) is preferred.
7. Strong software engineering fundamentals, especially around performance, reliability, and scalability in distributed systems.
8. Excellent communication skills and the ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, collaborative environment.
company_box_content: Create better access and prices for all – that’s our goal for financial markets the world over. As a leading global electronic market maker, we are dedicated to our mission of continuously improving the market. It’s a responsibility we don’t take lightly. It’s the driving force behind our business. Even in times of extreme volatility, we stay the course. Resolute in our belief that the market should always be liquid for economies to thrive.

As one of the oldest market-making institutions, we’re a trusted partner of exchanges. Our contribution to them ensures they remain stable, transparent and competitive. We provide liquidity to financial markets using our own capital, at our own risk, trading a wide range of products: listed derivatives, cash equities, ETFs, bonds, and foreign currencies.
We strongly believe in the positive power of the world’s markets. That’s why we’re committed to leading the way in market making for environmental, social, and corporate governance (ESG) products.
Optiver is a global company with offices in Amsterdam, Sydney, Chicago, Austin, Taipei, Hong Kong, Shanghai, London and Singapore.
company_description: Optiver is a global market maker with offices in multiple countries, providing liquidity in financial markets using technology and research. The company focuses on electronic trading and has a strong presence in financial hubs, indicating a large financial services firm.

head: Data Engineer
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 1 个月前 · 84 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About the Role

We're looking for a Data Engineer to design and maintain data platforms that power trading and research. You'll work on data pipelines, APIs, storage systems, and quality monitoring to ensure reliable, scalable, and efficient data services.
Responsibilities
1. Design, develop, and maintain market data systems, APIs, and ETL pipelines.
2. Manage data assets including databases, cloud storage, and metadata.
3. Integrate data vendors and automate ingestion, migration, and workflows.
4. Implement monitoring and alerting for data quality and reliability.
5. Optimize platform performance and support analytics and research tools.
Qualifications
1. Bachelor's degree or above in Computer Science or related field.
2. Strong programming skills in Python (NumPy, Pandas) and solid SQL knowledge.
3. Familiarity with Linux/Unix and database principles.
4. Good understanding of algorithms, debugging, and system design.
5. Strong communication, problem-solving, and teamwork skills.
Required Skills
1. Strong programming skills in Python (NumPy, Pandas) and solid SQL knowledge.
2. Familiarity with Linux/Unix and database principles.
3. Good understanding of algorithms, debugging, and system design.
4. Strong communication, problem-solving, and teamwork skills.
Preferred Skills
1. Experience with Airflow, cloud storage, big data platforms, or data warehouses.
2. Knowledge of time-series databases (InfluxDB, TDengine) and distributed systems.
3. Additional back-end languages (C++/Go/Java) are a plus.
4. Background in finance or quantitative workflows is an advantage.
company_box_content: From Investment Banking, Risk Management, Quantitative Trading, and Insurance, to Investment Management, Sales & Trading, Technology, and Wealth Management, Selby Jennings supports the world’s largest financial institutions to revolutionary fintech start-ups with all their hiring needs as a leading Financial Sciences and Services talent partner.

If you would like to talk to us about your current talent needs, please request a call back here and one of our specialist consultants will call you back to discuss your hiring needs: https://www.selbyjennings.com/request-a-call-back
表明对公司有意向的会员收到招聘专员消息的几率是未表明意向会员的 2 倍。
详细了解“有意向来我们公司工作”
company_description: A leading Financial Sciences and Services talent partner specializing in recruitment for financial institutions and fintech startups, focusing on investment banking, quantitative trading, and technology roles.

head: Consultant Specialist
info: 广州-佛山地区 · 2 周前 · 0 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Some Careers Have More Impact Than Others.
If you’re looking for a career where you can make a real impression, join HSBC and discover how valued you’ll be.
We are currently seeking an experienced professional to join our team in the role of
Consultant Specialist
Business:
Cybersecurity
Principal Responsibilities

The role will report to the Development lead, working within an agile, DevSecOps environment. The role will be responsible for Designing, developing, implementing, and supporting all the ETL process across global cybersecurity vulnerability management systems.
Some travel may be required.
The Role Will Be Accountable For The Following
Designing, developing, implementing, and supporting all the ETL process
Defining and implementing data structures, system designs and patterns
Developing tools and scripts for large volumes of data transition btw different systems
Perform Data analyst to make sure the data quality
Identifying bottlenecks and improving the ETL efficiency
Troubleshooting and bug fixing
Ensuring that issues raised in their area are solved and followed to conclusion
Writing technical documents to support items that have been developed and delivered by the team.
Proposing new technologies and techniques to quickly and comprehensively identify vulnerable infrastructure and platforms
Collaborating with stakeholders at various levels across Cybersecurity and other IT teams, to develop solutions that protect HSBC
Designing and driving the implementation of service offerings, capability uplifts, and process improvements to protect HSBC from a continuously changing threat landscape
Acting as a coach and mentor for other team members
Knowledge & Experience/Qualifications
Previous experience as a Data Engineer in an agile, DevSecOps environment
5+ years experience of Data Engineer/ETL (Python is a plus)
5+ years experience of Debugging (e.g. stack traces, log files and other system outputs)
5+ years experience of SQL (e.g. MySQL, DB2, Oracle, MongoDB, PostgreSQL)
5+ years experience of System Administration (e.g. configuring /managing servers, Linux /Windows)
Experience on airflow is a Plus
Knowledge of Vulnerability Scanning /Pen Testing /Red Teaming and associated scanning and consolidation products
Knowledge of working with application security tools (e.g. SAST, DAST, MAST)
Knowledge of Governance, Risk & Compliance processes
Knowledge of Patch Management processes
Automation and Orchestration driven mind-set
Good verbal and written communication skills
Ability to work and lead in a fast paced, team focused environment with a proven track record of delivering and completing assigned tasks as an individual and as team
Willingness to continuously learn and share learnings with others
HSBCVZ/GZ*
About HSBC Technology China
We develop, implement and support software and IT services and processes that allow HSBC to remain at the forefront of high-quality banking systems.
Candidate with less relevant experience or skills may be offered a lower Global Career Band than stated above.
You’ll achieve more when you join HSBC.

HSBC is an equal opportunity employer committed to building a culture where all employees are valued, respected and opinions count. We take pride in providing a workplace that fosters continuous professional development, flexible working and, opportunities to grow within an inclusive and diverse environment. We encourage applications from all suitably qualified persons irrespective of, but not limited to, their gender or genetic information, sexual orientation, ethnicity, religion, social status, medical care leave requirements, political affiliation, people with disabilities, color, national origin, veteran status, etc., We consider all applications based on merit and suitability to the role.”
Personal data held by the Bank relating to employment applications will be used in accordance with our Privacy Statement, which is available on our website.

company_box_content: Opening up a world of opportunity for our customers, investors, ourselves and the planet.

We're a financial services organisation that serves more than 40 million customers, ranging from individual savers and investors to some of the world’s biggest companies and governments. Our network covers 58 countries and territories, and we’re here to use our unique expertise, capabilities, breadth and perspectives to open up a world of opportunity for our customers.
HSBC is listed on the London, Hong Kong, New York, and Bermuda stock exchanges.
To view our social media terms and conditions please visit the following webpage: http://www.hsbc.com/social-TandCs
company_description: HSBC is one of the largest banking and financial services organizations globally, operating in 64 countries and territories, serving over 40 million customers. It aims to enable business growth and economic prosperity, with a network covering 58 countries and territories, leveraging unique expertise to open opportunities for customers.
